meaning: adj.无光泽的 无光彩的 平淡乏味的
examples: The early autumn was lustreless and slack.
The day was cool and rather lustreless; the first note of autumn had been struck.
Prince Bagration turned to the officer of the suite and stared at him with his lustreless eyes in silence.
As Juliette, Kristin Scott Thomas is first seen in closeup without makeup, her hair lustreless, her expression blank but tense.
